nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. Low around 38, with temperatures rising to around 55 overnight. South wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.shortForecast: Light Rain Likely then Light Snow Likely
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 8am, then rain likely between 8am and 5pm, then snow likely. Cloudy. High near 54, with temperatures falling to around 35 in the afternoon. West wind 12 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Light Snow then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of snow before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 30. Northwest wind 12 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 40. Southwest wind 6 to 12 mph.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Snow then Chance Light Rain
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of snow between 8pm and 9pm, then a chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 36. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain before 8am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 48. West wind 10 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 39 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 30. West wind 6 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 32 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 45. Northeast wind 5 to 8 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain likely after 8pm. Cloudy, with a low around 38. Southeast wind 8 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain. Cloudy, with a high near 61. South wind 18 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain. Cloudy, with a low around 37. Southwest wind 18 to 23 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Light Rain then Partly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain before noon. Partly sunny, with a high near 44. West wind 14 to 17 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
